blocks.text:
To: Steven Lowe
Cc: Jason Torres

Thank you for getting the first round of spend and headcount figures across so quickly. I have the finance and procurement numbers loaded and reconciled against the ledgers you sent, and the human resources and IT figures are close behind; I expect both to be reconciled by the end of next week. We are not drawing conclusions yet, and will not until the baseline is complete for {{fact:f:E-2018-001.client}}.

Two things would help us keep pace. We are still short the current service levels for the IT help desk and the payroll cycle, which we need before any comparison across units means much; if those live in a system rather than a document, a read-only extract is fine and we will pull the detail ourselves. And Jason Torres would like to sit with the function leads in your two largest units over the next couple of weeks; could you point us to the right person to arrange the times? An hour with each is enough to start.

Everything the Key Group team has sent so far has come in clean and well labeled, which makes the work faster. I will copy you as items on the request log close; nothing on it needs a decision from you this week beyond the two asks above.
